domains.name: Deploy and manage Azure compute resources

questions.text: You are preparing for Microsoft Azure Administrator and reviewing Manage Azure identities and governance. Which source aligns with official Microsoft Learn and Azure documentation?
questions.explanation: Use AZ-104 study guide and other official materials listed in the exam guide—not copied exam items.

questions.text: You are preparing for Microsoft Azure Administrator and reviewing Implement and manage storage. Which source aligns with official Microsoft Learn and Azure documentation?
questions.explanation: Use Azure Blob Storage and other official materials listed in the exam guide—not copied exam items.

questions.explanation: Use Azure Monitor and other official materials listed in the exam guide—not copied exam items.

questions.text: A regulated workload requires the organization to assign permissions at resource scope. Which solution is BEST?
questions.explanation: RBAC grants least-privilege access to Azure resources.

questions.text: For cost and security, the team must apply policies across subscriptions. What is the recommended approach?
questions.explanation: Azure Policy enforces organizational standards.

questions.text: An audit found gaps: the organization must federate on-premises AD with cloud. Which option addresses this?
questions.explanation: Entra Connect syncs directory identities.

questions.text: Operations reports a need to review who can assign roles. What is the MOST operationally efficient solution?
questions.explanation: PIM provides just-in-time elevation.

questions.explanation: RBAC grants least-privilege access to Azure resources.

questions.explanation: RBAC grants least-privilege access to Azure resources.

questions.text: A hybrid environment must support a goal to host SMB file shares in Azure without changing application code. What should you implement?
questions.explanation: Azure Files provides managed SMB/NFS shares.

questions.text: The DevOps team is automating releases and must tier infrequently accessed blobs. Which design fits best?

options.text: Premium SSD VM disks for archives

questions.explanation: Access tiers optimize blob storage cost.

questions.text: The DevOps team is automating releases and must sync on-prem files to cloud. Which design fits best?
questions.explanation: File Sync extends file shares to Azure.

questions.text: A hybrid environment must support a goal to protect blobs from accidental delete without changing application code. What should you implement?
questions.explanation: Blob protection aids recovery.

questions.text: After a design review, leadership requires the team to scale VM sets automatically. Which approach is MOST reliable?
questions.explanation: VMSS provides autoscale for identical VMs.

questions.text: For cost and security, the team must host web apps without managing VMs. What is the recommended approach?
questions.explanation: App Service is PaaS for web workloads.

questions.explanation: Update Manager orchestrates patching.

questions.text: Operations reports a need to run containers without managing servers. What is the MOST operationally efficient solution?
questions.explanation: Container Apps is serverless containers.

questions.text: For cost and security, the team must isolate subnets in a region. What is the recommended approach?
questions.explanation: VNets provide private RFC1918 networking in Azure.
